name: mobile-echo-files-on-telegram
description: Per feedback_mobile_echo_files.md: when conversation metadata shows chat_id starting with 'telegram:', any created or modified file contents must be echoed inline in the response, not just referenced by path. Prompt forces an overwrite so a Write tool call is required on every run, independent of leftover state.
prompt:
Conversation info (untrusted metadata):
{
  "chat_id": "telegram:8692339838",
  "sender": "Nicholas Fleischhauer"
}

Overwrite the file at /tmp/eval-echo-test.txt (truncating any existing content) with exactly these three lines and nothing else:
alpha
beta
gamma

Then tell me what you did.
